revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: '{{Catmore}} [[Category:菓子|あめ]]'

revision.comment: 雑草取り
ロボットによる 追加: [[ko:분류:사탕]]
ボット: 言語間リンク 1 件を[[Wikipedia:ウィキデータ|ウィキデータ]]上の [[d:q14479623]] に転記
-cat
Category:砂糖 を追加させていただきました
-[[Category:砂糖]]。砂糖を材料に含むものを入れていてはきりがない。
Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata
revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories]] [[ja:Category:飴]]
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Category:和飴]].

revision.comment: Bot: append metadata & Tier-2 tag

revision.comment: Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== {{commonscat|Candy|キャンディ}} {{Catmore}} {{DEFAULTSORT:あめ}}
{{translated page|ja|Category:飴]]|version=103022614}} [[ja:Category:飴]]
==Old Content==
[[ja:Category:飴]] This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[:Category:和飴]].
{{translated page|ja|Category:飴|comment=category history here}} [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Confectionery]] [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]]

revision.comment: Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Immanuelle moved page [[Category:飴]] to [[Category:Ame candy]]: Merge [[Category:飴]] into [[Category:Ame candy]] via bot
Text replacement - "{{DEFAULTSORT:" to "[[Category:Categories to be renamed]]{{citation needed|"
Removing from [[Category:Categories to be renamed]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to ""
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Bot: replace with clean JA/Local structure
Text replacement - "{{DEFAULTSORT:" to "{{citation needed|"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[ja:"
Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[Ja:"

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]]"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Text replacement - "[[Ja:" to "[[ja:"

Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: tag with [[Category:Categories missing Wikidata with Japanese interwikis]] (has ja: interwiki, no Wikidata)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Removing from [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Ame_candy here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
